rewritten_requirements: The system shall start a training request upon creation.
The system shall send the request for approval after its creation.
The system shall end the process if the request is rejected.
The system shall look for a suitable session if the request is accepted.
The system shall perform enrolment once a session is chosen.
The system shall satisfy the request if enrolment is confirmed.
The system shall allow completion of the session after enrolment confirmation.
The system shall allow cancellation of a selected session and selection of a new one.
The system shall end the process if the request is cancelled at any point before completion.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A training request starts when it is created.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A training request starts when it is created.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After creation, the request is sent for approval.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After that, it is sent for approval.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the request is rejected, the process ends.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is rejected, the process ends.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the request is accepted, a suitable session is looked for.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is accepted, the person looks for a suitable session.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once a session is chosen, enrolment is done.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once a session is chosen, enrolment is done.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If enrolment is confirmed, the request is satisfied.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If enrolment is confirmed, the request is satisfied.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The session can be completed after enrolment confirmation.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: From there, the session can be completed

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A selected session can be cancelled and a new one chosen.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: It is also possible to cancel a selected session and go back to choose again.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: At any point before completion, the request can be cancelled, which ends the process.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At any point before completion, the request can be cancelled, which ends the process.
